name: @algorandfoundation/ac2-open-claw-reference
description: Reference OpenClaw plugin for the AC2 protocol. Implements signing, chat, and x402 Algorand paid fetch over Liquid Auth.

scripts.build: node scripts/bundle.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/bundle.mjs --flatten-dts
scripts.install:plugin: node scripts/bundle.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/bundle.mjs --flatten-dts && TGZ="$(node scripts/pack-plugin.mjs --pack-destination /tmp | tail -n1)" && openclaw plugins install "file:$TGZ" --dangerously-force-unsafe-install --force && npm rebuild --prefix "${OPENCLAW_HOME:-$HOME/.openclaw}/extensions/ac2" @napi-rs/keyring && openclaw plugins enable ac2

channelEnvVars.name: AC2_LIQUID_AUTH_SERVER
channelEnvVars.description: Liquid Auth signaling server origin. Overrides the `liquidAuthServer` channel config at runtime. Defaults to https://debug.liquidauth.com when neither is set.

channelEnvVars.name: AC2_HEARTBEAT_TIMEOUT_MS
channelEnvVars.description: Milliseconds without inbound ac2-heartbeat traffic before the plugin closes the channel. Defaults to 50000.
